title: Silo vs. Pool vs. Bridge
description: Evaluate the architectural differences between silo, pool, and bridge models for multi-tenant data storage. Analyze the trade-offs in isolation, operational overhead, and scalability between "Database-per-Tenant" and "Shared Schema" approaches.
objectives: Evaluate the architectural differences between silo, pool, and bridge models for multi-tenant data storage.
Analyze the trade-offs in isolation, operational overhead, and scalability between "Database-per-Tenant" and "Shared Schema" approaches.
